params.name: filters
params.description: Elasticsearch-style filter expression. Supports AND/OR, exclusions (!), and ranges.

params.name: search
params.description: Free-text search across indexed fields.

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return.

params.name: sort_by
params.description: Field name to sort results by.

params.name: sort_order
params.description: Sort direction (ASC or DESC).

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of records to return per request.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of records to skip for pagination.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format (json or csv). Equivalent to setting Accept header.
